name: multichain-lib-vite-fixture
description: Reproduction fixture for the @maximus-chain/multichain-lib browser bug. Imports the package via `import { create } from '@maximus-chain/multichain-lib'` and forces the sha256ripemd160 → ripemd160 → hash-base → readable-stream path. If the package resolution does not point at the precompiled ESM bundle the page crashes with `TypeError: can't access property "slice", process.version is undefined`.
